evaluator: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) — runtime-facing inspection on behalf of LENS V2 cinematic realization stream

A_focal_strength.notes: Declaration:summary size ratio 2.63 (below 3.0 threshold). Mass-ratio 0.99 — summary marginally heavier than declaration. Eye landing contested between declaration and summary. Two competing focal anchors: 42px declaration and right-side 5-block status grid.

B_executive_readability.notes: Monospace primary typography (Courier New) violates §5.3 typography-first hierarchy and FT/Editorial / Bloomberg avoid clauses. Surface reads as old-Bloomberg / monitoring terminal rather than executive briefing. Body content is correct; medium is wrong.

C_operational_atmosphere.notes: Flat near-black ground (rgb(13,15,20)) with no environmental gradient. ≥ 3 saturated hues simultaneously visible across declaration, status panel, and qualifier band. Surface reads as developer dark-mode rather than institutional atmosphere.

D_cinematic_depth.notes: Two depth tiers (ground + cards). No backdrop blur on authority band. No environmental gradient. Motion is restrained but the surface reads as static-flat.

E_anti_dashboard.notes: Status sidebar with 5 identical-width blocks (anti-dashboard §3.2 + §9). Evidence grid with 3 identical-width components (grid-gravity §7). 5-second confusion test fails — independent reads pattern-match SaaS / monitoring.

F_executive_immersion.notes: Surface holds attention but feels like internal-tooling-serious rather than institution-serious. Stream code 'PI.LENS.V2 · REFINEMENT.01' exposed in primary chrome breaks institutional trust contract.

A_focal_strength.notes: Declaration:summary size ratio 3.56 (above 3.0 threshold). Mass-ratio 2.29 — declaration unambiguously dominant. First-eye landing zone clear and confirmed by visual review of after_1728x1117_viewport.png.

B_executive_readability.notes: Humanist sans system stack installed. Body 18px / 1.65 line-height / weight 400. Declaration 64px / weight 600. Reading register institutional executive briefing. Narrative reads as voiced rather than terminal-typed.

C_operational_atmosphere.notes: Graphite ground (rgb(20,23,31)) with subtle dual radial environmental gradient. Authority band semi-transparent with backdrop-blur. ≤ 2 saturated hues simultaneously visible. No marketing register.

D_cinematic_depth.notes: Three depth tiers visible: ground → primary surface → focal lift on declaration / first evidence block. Backdrop blur on authority band lifts cleanly above ground. Motion remains friction-heavy entrance only — no bounce, no overshoot.

E_anti_dashboard.notes: Zero regular grids on primary surface. Status sidebar collapsed to single calm anchor. Evidence grid composes dominant + supporting (max 2 consecutive identical, within doctrine limit). 5-second confusion test passes — independent reads name 'executive operational intelligence'.

F_executive_immersion.notes: Surface holds attention as institutional. Internal taxonomy removed from primary chrome. Operational identity 'Program · Delivery Coordination' replaces stream code. Two residual notes: density toggles still on primary surface (currently demoted, not removed); Blocked / Diagnostic states not visually verified in this iteration.

iteration_recommendations: Capture and inspect Blocked and Diagnostic state surfaces; current iteration only inspected EXECUTIVE_READY_WITH_QUALIFIER.

Tune topology chain visual register further — consider re-pacing connector mass and label register to lean further toward operational-narrative reading.
Compress governance ribbon — collapse passing items by default; surface failures only.
